title: mentha canescens var. schultzii
intro: Mentha canescens var. schultzii, also known as a variety of peppermint or Bergamot mint, is a type of herb belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to ease digestion issues and reduce nausea, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mentha canescens var. schultzii include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote respiratory health. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and also used in aromatherapy to release its fragrant oils and promote well-being.
